title: Baby Bio 84899143 Leaf Shine, 200ml - Ready To Use Houseplant Care - Aerosol Spray for a Natural Long Lasting and Healthy Shine - Removes Dust from Plant Leaves - Prevents Yellowing
features: LEAF SHINE: A convenient aerosol spray that makes your houseplants look their best
SUITABLE FOR: Baby Bio Leaf Shin is suitable for use on houseplants with smooth, waxy leaves
ANTI-DUST: No need to waste time polishing or dusting leaves as the formula breaks the dust down to provide a natural looking, long-lasting shine
HEALTHY GROWTH: Keeping your houseplants dust-free ensures sunlight can reach it's leaves properly, maximising it's growth
PROMOTES HEALTH: Helps your houseplants breath easier, as it unclogs the microscopic pores in it's leaves to keep them healthy
description: From the manufacturer LONG LASTING, NATURAL LOOKING SHINE FOR HEALTHIER, MORE BEAUTIFUL HOUSEPLANTS RADIANT RESULTS Baby Bio Leaf Shine not only adds a beautiful shine to the leaves but also helps keep them dust-free, maximizing the light that reaches your plants for better growth. By unblocking the stomata, the tiny pores on the leaves, Baby Bio Leaf Shine also aids in improving your houseplants’ ability to breathe, promoting healthier plants. SIMPLE SPRAY SOLUTION Simply spray it on your plants, and you'll immediately achieve a beautiful, polished look without the need for additional polishing or dusting. The fine mist effortlessly coats your plants, leaving them with a glossy, vibrant shine that enhances their appearance. SUITABLE FOR SMOOTH & WAXY PLANTS By providing the ideal care for these types of plants, it helps maintain their vibrant, glossy appearance while promoting healthy growth. Whether you're caring for a popular monstera, the elegant rubber fig, or a delicate peace lily, this product ensures that your plants thrive with minimal effort. An organic formulation containing essential NPK plus seaweed for healthier houseplants. Enriched with essential NPK for healthier houseplants. Enriched with essential micro and macro nutrients. Contains a new, foliar bug treatment, flupyradifurone for the control of sucking pests, such as aphids, whiteflies and many more. A balanced and nutrient rich formulation infused with seaweed.
